name: Szechwan Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Oriental noodles, chicken flavored, broken up
6 Apples, medium, cored and coarsely chopped
6 oz Pea pods, frozen, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, stir together chicken broth, noodles, flavoring packet, red pepper, and 3 soup cans (3 3/4 cups) water.
2. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Return to boiling.
6. Serve at once.
